steps.title: Focus on the finding
steps.content: The audience already understands seedling emergence, so the sentence should not define it. It should present Garcia and Patel's finding: in the stated conditions, plant litter negatively affected seedling emergence.

steps.title: Avoid irrelevant details
steps.content: Choice A is too vague and never states the finding. Choice C includes the definition the audience does not need. Choice D gives only the year. The remaining option includes the researchers, conditions, and result without padding. The answer is B.
